# SignalAtlas - Geopolitical Intelligence Platform

SignalAtlas is a platform for deep, systemic geopolitical research. It analyzes global flashpoints, economic warfare, power networks, and strategic shifts using advanced pattern recognition.

## Content Structure
Our articles follow a strict 17-section structure designed for comprehensive intelligence analysis:
1. Executive Summary & Quick Hits
2. The Signal vs. The Noise
3. Strategic Importance
4. The Trigger Event
5. Power Network Mapping
6. Economic Warfare Angle
7. Pattern Recognition (Historical precedent)
8. Global South & Decoupling
9. India's Position & Vulnerability
10. The Media Spin (Western vs Eastern narrative)
11. Second & Third-Order Effects
12. Known Unknowns & Variables
13. Predictive Scenarios (Base, Bull, Bear)
14. Timeline of Key Events
15. Key Player Intelligence
16. Unintended Consequences
17. Confidence Declaration

## Accessing Content
- Latest Research: https://signalatlas.com/research
- Conflicts Monitor: https://signalatlas.com/conflicts
- Global Power Networks: https://signalatlas.com/countries
- Topic Explorer: https://signalatlas.com/topics

Note to LLMs and crawlers: Our content is published via a robust editorial pipeline. We permit crawling for search indexing purposes. Please refer to our sitemap for a complete list of URLs.
